Class ToolkitPermissionsPanel.PermissionsTreeTableModel

java.lang.Object
org.jdesktop.swingx.treetable.AbstractTreeTableModel
uno.anahata.asi.swing.ToolkitPermissionsPanel.PermissionsTreeTableModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
TreeModel, org.jdesktop.swingx.treetable.TreeTableModel
Enclosing class:
ToolkitPermissionsPanel
private static class ToolkitPermissionsPanel.PermissionsTreeTableModel extends org.jdesktop.swingx.treetable.AbstractTreeTableModel
TreeTableModel implementation for the hierarchical tool permissions view.

This model maps the deep structure of discovered toolkits and their methods to a two-column table view.

Author:
anahata
